# GitHub Repository Configuration

## Repository Description
Resource-aware Java task executor with automatic pause/resume. Offload heavy background tasks and let your app focus on business logic. 🚀

## Topics (Tags)
Add these topics to your GitHub repository (Settings → Topics):

- java
- concurrency
- executor-service
- task-scheduler
- resource-management
- background-jobs
- spring-boot
- thread-pool
- batch-processing
- adaptive-executor
- cpu-monitoring
- memory-monitoring
- pause-resume
- priority-scheduling
- java17
- java-library
- open-source
- maven-central

## Website URL
https://github.com/sdeonvacation/throttle

## Social Preview Image
Recommended size: 1280x640px
Create an image with:
- Project logo/name
- Tagline: "Resource-Aware Task Execution for Java"
- Key features visualization
- GitHub stars/Maven Central badge

## About Section
```
🚀 Resource-aware Java task executor with automatic pause/resume capabilities

✨ Features:
• Adaptive pause/resume based on CPU/memory
• Priority-based task scheduling
• Zero external dependencies
• Spring Boot ready
• Complete client control

📦 Available on Maven Central
⭐ Star to support the project!
```

## How to Apply Topics on GitHub:
1. Go to https://github.com/sdeonvacation/throttle
2. Click "⚙️ Settings" (gear icon) next to "About" section on the right
3. Add topics (comma or space separated)
4. Add description and website URL
5. Check "Releases" and "Packages" if applicable
6. Save changes

## Enable GitHub Features:
Go to Settings → General:
- ✅ Issues
- ✅ Discussions (NEW - enable this!)
- ✅ Projects (if you want to use GitHub Projects)
- ✅ Wikis (for additional documentation)
- ✅ Sponsorships (if you want GitHub Sponsors)

Go to Settings → Features:
- ✅ Enable "Discussions" - This is IMPORTANT for community engagement!
